new_claims.claim_text: Operation Sending Them “BACK TO THE STONE AGE” has begun in Tehran, implying significant destruction.
new_claims.notes: Initial claim of military operation and destruction.

new_claims.claim_text: President Trump shares video allegedly showing a prominent Iranian bridge destroyed by joint U.S.-Israeli strikes, claiming it will 'never be used again'.
new_claims.notes: Claim of infrastructure destruction in Iran, attributed to US-Israeli strikes.
